title: L'Atlantide
writer: Pierre Benoît, Alexandre Arnoux, Ladislaus Vajda
actors: Brigitte Helm, Pierre Blanchar, John Stuart
plot: Antinea. the Queen of Atlantis, rules her secret kingdom hidden beneath the Sahara Desert. One day two lost explorers stumble into her kingdom, and soon realize that they haven't really been saved--Antinea has a habit of taking me...
